ResourceHeader.Description:
Earth imaging, sun-synchronous spacecraft that also measure measure downward particle fluxes, 
	  magnetic fields, electron densities, ion drifts, and provide visible light images on the 
	  different spacecraft near the Earth.

InformationURL.Name: HelioData
InformationURL.Description: The HelioData mission page provides an overview of the mission and more, such as all SPASE dataset records associated with it.
